'''L-23''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] who belonged to [[Byrom]] and [[Ensa]], two farmers living on the planet of [[Molavar/Legends|Molavar]]. During one of the farmers' routine repair runs on their antiquated [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporators]], L-23 was sliced in half by [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Lycan]]'s lightsaber, as he approached them.
